data.name: Växjö Science Park - Visualization Lab
data.description: An innovation hub and science park in Kronoberg that drives regional business growth, entrepreneurship, and sustainable development through targeted focus areas and strategic networks.

data.name: Visual City
data.description: An interactive lab at Visualiseringscenter C showcasing urban development through AI, computer vision, and a digital twin of Norrköping.

data.name: VisLab
data.description: An interactive visualization laboratory at Universeum in Gothenburg, allowing visitors to explore real scientific data regarding climate, ecosystems, and human anatomy.

data.name: Wadströms Exploranation Laboratory
data.description: A Linköping University lab at Visualization Center C blending exploration and explanation to research global sustainability datasets.

frontmatter.name: Wadströms Exploranation Laboratory

data.name: Wisdome
data.description: Wisdome is a collaboration between five leading science centers in Sweden—Visualizationcenter C in Norrköping, Universeum in Gothenburg, Tekniska museet in Stockholm, Malmö Museum, and Curiosum in Umeå—initiated with support from a centennial donation by the Knut and Alice Wallenberg Foundation.
